content: shadcn/ui with Tailwind v4 + Vite: install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite, add @import 'tailwindcss' to index.css (no tailwind.config.js needed), configure tsconfig paths (@/* -> ./src/*), configure vite.config.ts with tailwindcss() plugin and path alias, then run 'npx shadcn@latest init'. Tailwind v4 works with React 18 — only new shadcn init defaults to React 19. v4 uses @theme directive in CSS instead of tailwind.config.js.
